Stone.description: Chunks of sedimentary rock, easily worked.
Stone.flavorText: The geomorphology of Icarus has some similarities to Earth, but in many regards remains a mystery.

Stick.description: Small branches, easily fashioned into basic tools.
Stick.flavorText: Whether making weapons or tools, a crafting bench or fuel, basic creation begins with the humble stick.

Sulfur.description: A common, flammable ingredient for torches and gunpowder.
Sulfur.flavorText: The tenth most common element in the universe, sulfur is essential for life, but also death, through its many different modes of incineration.

Stone_Axe.description: A roughly-made axe, but fells trees well enough.
Stone_Axe.flavorText: The first step on a path that leads back to the 22nd century.

Stone_Knife.description: A basic hunting tool, strong and sharp enough ... just.
Stone_Knife.flavorText: Icarus\'s unusually active tectonics provide a ready source of sedimentary rocks, making for easily knapped, sharp, but weak blades.

Stone_Arrow.description: The most basic version of an ancient weapon.
Stone_Arrow.flavorText: Attempts to redesign the planet failed, but the terrazone nonetheless has a ready supply of raw ingredients for this \'rock on a stick\'.

Stone_Furnace.description: A simple stone furnace for smelting iron, copper and steel.
Stone_Furnace.flavorText: Bronze-age technology, spread to the stars.

Wood_Crate_Small.description: A modest wooden crate for storing small items.

Silica.description: A key ingredient in concrete, glass and many other materials.
Silica.flavorText: The Silicon Age on Icarus is yet to arrive.

Shotgun.description: The reliable and timeless pump-action, savage at short range.

Stone_Pickaxe.flavorText: The soft sedimentary rock scattered across Icarus\'s surface is easily shaped into useful tools. They may not be durable, but can be repaired easily enough.

Stone_Frame.description: A heavy stone foundation, extends height and stability of constructions.

Stone_Wall.description: Build stronger structures, unthreatened by fire.

Stone_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Stone_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Stone_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Stone_Floor.description: Roughly hewn flagstones, unlikely to burn.

Envirosuit_Shengong.description: Enhanced heat resistance with extended resource and module capacity.
Envirosuit_Shengong.flavorText: Shengong\'s \'protextile\' system relies on ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastic \'cloth\', offering lightweight heat protection and rapid 3D printability.

Envirosuit_Shengong2.description: Offers reinforced insulation for cold-weather environments with extended resource and module capacity.
Envirosuit_Shengong2.flavorText: Shengong\'s \'protextile\' system relies on ultra-high molecular weight thermoplastic \'cloth\', offering lightweight protection and rapid 3D printability.

Stone_Ramp.description: A sturdy stone ramp or roof to resist the elements.

Smoke_Grenade.description: A canister grenade, used for drawing attention or concealing.

Skinning_Bench.description: Fully processes animal carcasses for more resources.
Skinning_Bench.flavorText: As any hunter knows, preparing an animal can be a slow, messy, wasteful task. The right tools make all the difference.

Spoiled_Meat.description: Animal flesh, considerably past its best-by date.
Spoiled_Meat.flavorText: You wouldn\'t be the first prospector desperate enough to eat this.

Sponge.description: A useful herbal ingredient, and holds a small amount of water.

Sponge_Filled.description: A useful herbal ingredient, and holds a small amount of water.

Scorpion_Hedgehog_Medium.description: A medium sized hedgehog-style defensive structure with poisonous stingers for extra damage.

Scorpion_Trap_Medium.description: Similar to a bear trap, this is one device you do NOT want to stand on. Can be reset after activation.
Scorpion_Trap_Medium.flavorText: Be sure to give it a wide berth

ResourceStack_Stone.flavorText: A time honored solution for storing rubble, stone and debris.

Stone_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for much higher building.
Stone_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor. Increasing the quantity of beams at lower levels will increase build height further.

Solar_Panel.description: This solar panel needs to be in direct sunlight to create power, best deployed in a large, open area.
Solar_Panel.flavorText: As effective under this star as any other.

Interior_Wood_Crate_Small.description: A small storage unit for items.

Rug_Snow_Wolf.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Rug_SnowLeopard.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

Paste_Stamina_Regen.description: An organic stimulant that accelerates stamina recovery.
Paste_Stamina_Regen.flavorText: A herbal preparation that acts rapidly on the sympathetic nervous system, increasing noradrenergic activity.

Paste_Stamina_Buff.description: A herbal concoction, temporarily increasing stamina.
Paste_Stamina_Buff.flavorText: While lacking some of the pharmaceutical refinements, this paste produces similar physiological affects to the \'wakers\' once offered to long haul space pilots.

Paste_Stamina_Restore.description: A natural stimulant that restores lost stamina.
Paste_Stamina_Restore.flavorText: As countless athletes, party-goers and would-be mystics have noted, the line between natural stimulant and highly addictive narcotic is arbitrary, at best.

Paste_Stamina_Consumption.description: A biotic compound that slows stamina loss temporarily.
Paste_Stamina_Consumption.flavorText: The time-jarring effects of exotics find their influence in many subtle, poorly understood ways on Icarus.

Steel_Spear.description: A light, strong traditional spear design that holds its edge.
Steel_Spear.flavorText: The word \'spear\' has descended to us through the ages largely unchanged.

Steel_Axe.description: A steel axe, for swifter felling and hewing.
Steel_Axe.flavorText: Steel of this quality would be an embarrassment to any industry on Earth, but on Icarus remains a minor miracle.

Steel_Ingot.description: A medium-density ingot of carbon steel.
Steel_Ingot.flavorText: Stronger than iron, more elastic than rubber. Sometimes.

Steel_Bloom.description: A precursor mixture of iron ore and coal, smelted in a concrete furnace to create steel.
Steel_Bloom.flavorText: The conditions on Icarus give its would-be metallurgists very little control over the finer details of steel smelting. A basic bloomery process prevails.

Steel_Knife.flavorText: Finely balanced knives like this can be thrown accurately with a little practice.

Steel_Pickaxe.description: Tempered steel, suitable for even the toughest of metals.
Steel_Pickaxe.flavorText: When first landing on Icarus prospectors quickly discovered the need for stronger metals to deal with the local ore.

Steel_Bolt.description: A hard-hitting steel bolt, trading distance for damage.
Steel_Bolt.flavorText: Roughly 64,000 years since its first invention, the essential form of the bolt remains unchanged.

Suture_Kit.description: A basic medical kit for healing deep wounds.
Suture_Kit.flavorText: Whether lightly or deeply wounded, \'Permit the pain to pass over you, and through you.\' - Bao Li Wei

Stone_Roof_Corner.description: A robust insert for angled roofs.

Concrete_Roof_Corner.description: A collection of Steel Roofing pieces.

Steel_Hammer.description: The most efficient tool for repairing damaged structures.
Steel_Hammer.flavorText: The tidal forces of Minos produce exceptionally violent weather on Icarus, its largest moon, which in turn damages even the most robust construction. A steel hammer can even the odds ... a little.

Steel_Rebar.description: Heavy, ribbed steel wire for reinforcing concrete.

Sandworm_Scale.flavorText: When held in the hand, fresh from the worm\'s body, the scale gently vibrated. Slowly, this motion drained away, leaving only a flake of light, hugely strong armor.

Sandworm_Knife.flavorText: Evolved to resist prolonged sand abrasion, the sandworm\'s chitin-analogue scales holds an excellent edge.

Sandworm_Spear.description: A spear crafted from an ancient organism\'s armor.
Sandworm_Spear.flavorText: Group 15 continues to research sandworms, suspecting its subterranean evolution could hold clues to the bioeffects of exotics.

Sandworm_Arrow.flavorText: While the sandworm\'s existence inside the terrazone is a mystery, its scales make extraordinarily practical blades.

Sandworm_Bow.description: A bow fashioned from the stronger scales of a Sandworm.

Meta_Axe_Shengong_Alpha.description: A single-bit axe with 3D-printed handle and metallic head.
Meta_Axe_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: While the Heike delivers a lot more wood with every strike, this lightweight power comes at the cost of swifter wear and tear.

Meta_Axe_Shengong_Beta.description: An efficient, if less than durable harvesting implement.
Meta_Axe_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: Shengong Inc. was founded by Sinotai in 2082 CE.

Meta_Axe_Shengong_Charlie.description: A basic, but respectable felling tool.
Meta_Axe_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: For a single, simple reason, handtools such as this experienced a resurgence as humanity settle worlds other than Earth: reliability.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Alpha.description: A high yield, heavy mining tool from an industrial giant.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: Typically for Shengong, the Kuang\'s weight translates to power and improved results, but tends to slow and tire its users.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Beta.description: A robust and hard-bladed alloy steel mining axe.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: A tool to break the soil of many worlds.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Charlie.description: A serviceable pickaxe, with an edge for fine metal.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: Until it came to seem outdated, Shengong branded itself as \'Armorer to the Solar System\'.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Delta.description: A basic pickaxe, robust if mass-produced.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Delta.flavorText: "A pick axe ain\'t never run outta power." - Sol Berlinski

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Alpha.description: A heavy, powerful blade, but takes extra energy to use effectively.
Meta_Knife_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: An iconic knife found wherever humanity has spread, the Qie\'s weight makes it a potent, if sometimes punishing weapon.

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: \'The knife of the family does not cut.\' ~ Proverb

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Charlie.description: A strong, if weighty close quarters weapon.
Meta_Knife_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: \'A knife does not recognise its owner.\' ~ Proverb

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Delta.description: A basic but brutal straight-back skinning knife.
Meta_Knife_Shengong_Delta.flavorText: A rough weapon for tough conditions - slice, skin, stab or throw the Sichou, and watch your fingers.

Squash.flavorText: A myriad of squash varieties exist, but the effects of genetic tampering by xeno-biologiest have resulted in a variant with noticeable endurance-enhancing qualities.

Cooked_Mushroom.flavorText: Mushrooms are notably the only lifeform introduced from Earth that required no genetic adjustment whatsoever.

Corn_Soup.description: A classic dish, even without shredded chicken.
Corn_Soup.flavorText: Boosts stamina and improves endurance. Drains nostalgia.

Meat_Stew.flavorText: Some foods profit from rustic conditions. Boosts health, lifts stamina.

Fried_Soy_Beans.description: Boosts health, lifts stamina, enhances self-satisfaction.
Fried_Soy_Beans.flavorText: One of the original crops intended to sustain humanity on its first new extra-solar world.

Bean.description: Close to the perfect food source.
Bean.flavorText: The argument over whether soy produces \'milk\' or \'juice\' rages into the 22nd century.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Alpha.description: The Xingxing may not excel in any area, but represents unalloyed adequacy.
Meta_Spear_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: No weapons are more widespread in human space than Shengong\'s.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Beta.description: Doesn\'t need to last a lifetime, to save one.
Meta_Spear_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: Shengong\'s designs excel in no particular areas, but as a result have produced many classics of design economy.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Charlie.description: A decent spear that knows exactly what it is.
Meta_Spear_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: Shengong is a subsidary of Asia\'s space administration, Sinotai. Its operation may be highly beauracratic, but its products are legendary for their efficiency.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Delta.description: A minor miracle of low cost production.

Meta_Hammer_Shengong_Alpha.description: A highly economic and affordable repair hammer, like so many Shengong products.
Meta_Hammer_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: Shengong resolve the scarcity of replacement parts in space by ensuring its products share many common parts.

Meta_Hammer_Shengong_Beta.description: A highly economic and affordable design, like so many Shengong products.
Meta_Hammer_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: From hammers to space stations, Shengong Inc makes it all.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Alpha.description: An affordable, reliable and efficient bow with acceptable performance.
Meta_Bow_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: Shengong designs are not designed to last, but rather, for ease of repair, being defined by the high degree of interchangeability of parts between their products.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Beta.description: A powerful, if not especially durable recurve design.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: A Shengong knock-off of a classic design.

Meta_Arrow_Shengong.description: Arrows of decent quality, if unremarkable performance.
Meta_Arrow_Shengong.flavorText: Shengong is the sister company of C.H.A.C., specializing in off-world equipment and weaponry.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Shengong.description: 25 arrows of decent quality, if unremarkable performance. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Set_Shengong.flavorText: Shengong Inc. are a wholly owned subsidary of Sinotai.

Meta_Arrow_Shengong_x25.description: Arrows of decent quality, if unremarkable performance.
Meta_Arrow_Shengong_x25.flavorText: Shengong is the sister company of C.H.A.C., specializing in off-world equipment and weaponry.

Meta_Canteen_Shengong.description: A durable and economic water container.
Meta_Canteen_Shengong.flavorText: Exactly how the Hulu became such an icon of off-world existence is lost in a froth of interplanetary memes.

Meta_Oxygen_Tank_Shengong.flavorText: Named in memory of Yang Liwei.

Wood_Cupboard_Small.description: A modest wooden cupboard for storing small items.

Interior_Wood_Cupboard_Small.description: A small storage unit for items.

Mission_Ship_Cargo.description: The ACS seem to want this pretty badly.
Mission_Ship_Cargo.flavorText: What is this? How does it work? One of lifes great mysteries...

SnowLeopard_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Snow Leopard.
SnowLeopard_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

SnowLeopard_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

SnowWolf_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Snow Wolf.
SnowWolf_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

SnowWolf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Meta_Squash_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Squash Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Corn_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Pumpkin_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Squash_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Carrot_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Mushroom_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Berry_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Wheat_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Watermelon_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Bean_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Survival_Backpack.description: A backpack geared to help you survive in the wilderness
Survival_Backpack.flavorText: Provides a quick and easy way to carry more items, with reduced fall damage

Scale_Head.description: Provides decent all-round protection at the cost of aggravating nearby wildlife

Scale_Chest.description: Provides decent all-round protection at the cost of aggravating nearby wildlife

Scale_Arms.description: Provides decent all-round protection at the cost of aggravating nearby wildlife

Scale_Legs.description: Provides decent all-round protection at the cost of aggravating nearby wildlife

Scale_Feet.description: Provides decent all-round protection at the cost of aggravating nearby wildlife

Spoiled_Plants.description: This produce is certainly past its best
Spoiled_Plants.flavorText: I wouldn\'t eat that if I were you

Scorpion_Pincer.description: A pincer taken from the body of a slain Scorpion
Scorpion_Pincer.flavorText: Keep your fingers and toes clear at all times

Scorpion_Tail.description: A dangerous prize taken from a deadly foe

Meta_Carbon_Armor_Helmet_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Armor_Helmet_Alpha.flavorText: One of the many triumphs of human engineering.

Meta_Carbon_Armor_Chest_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Armor_Chest_Alpha.flavorText: Disclaimer: Processed in a factory that also handles radioactive material.

Meta_Carbon_Armor_Arms_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Armor_Arms_Alpha.flavorText: Please report any unusal side effects to your local UDA office.

Meta_Carbon_Armor_Legs_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Armor_Legs_Alpha.flavorText: These armor pieces are made of the latest [REDACTED] materials.

Meta_Carbon_Armor_Feet_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Armor_Feet_Alpha.flavorText: Some users may notice a mild tingling sensation when wearing these boots for an extended period.

Meta_Module_Alpha.description: Enables prospectors near you to carry more weight. Buff does not apply to the wearer.

Steel_Arrow.description: A stronger arrow head, more durable than flint.
Steel_Arrow.flavorText: Tempered and fletched, the steel arrow has significant upsides over comparable alternatives.

Scorpion_Head_Armor.description: Provides excellent protection at the cost of significantly aggravating nearby wildlife.
Scorpion_Head_Armor.flavorText: No amount of washing will get rid of the smell.

Scorpion_Chest_Armor.description: Provides excellent protection at the cost of significantly aggravating nearby wildlife.
Scorpion_Chest_Armor.flavorText: No amount of washing will get rid of the smell.

Scorpion_Arms_Armor.description: Provides excellent protection at the cost of significantly aggravating nearby wildlife.
Scorpion_Arms_Armor.flavorText: No amount of washing will get rid of the smell.

Scorpion_Legs_Armor.description: Provides excellent protection at the cost of significantly aggravating nearby wildlife.
Scorpion_Legs_Armor.flavorText: No amount of washing will get rid of the smell.

Scorpion_Feet_Armor.description: Provides excellent protection at the cost of significantly aggravating nearby wildlife.
Scorpion_Feet_Armor.flavorText: No amount of washing will get rid of the smell.

Scorpion_Carapace.description: A remnant of a great beast.
Scorpion_Carapace.flavorText: A flake of light, but fairly strong armor.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Catalyst.description: A catalyst to stabilize volatile materials.
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Catalyst.flavorText: Making it a little safer to handle certain raw materials.

Helmet_Attachment_Cave_Resistance_1.description: An attachment that helps prevent cave sickness and improves health regeneration while in caves.
Helmet_Attachment_Cave_Resistance_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to head armor at an Alteration Bench.

Helmet_Attachment_Storm_Resistance_1.description: An attachment that improves stamina regeneration in storms and exposure resistance.
Helmet_Attachment_Storm_Resistance_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to head armor at an Alteration Bench.

Helmet_Attachment_Poison_Water_1.description: An attachment that reduces the chance of poison and water usage.
Helmet_Attachment_Poison_Water_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to head armor at an Alteration Bench.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Wear_1.description: An attachment that increases the speed of projectiles and uses less stamina.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Wear_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow, or crossbow.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Stealth_1.description: An attachment that increases your damage while stealthed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Stealth_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid pistol, shotgun, or rifle.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Sniper_1.description: An attachment that allows you a closer view of your target, and increases damage.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Sniper_1.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid rifle.

Scoria.description: A rough-textured rock ejected from the earth during volcanic activity.
Scoria.flavorText: Also known in some areas as \'lava stone\'.

Super_Cooled_Ice.description: A volatile substance that can cause frostbite in seconds.

Shaped_Obsidian.description: Carefully carved, this material can hold a razor edge.
Shaped_Obsidian.flavorText: This material has been historically used for weapons, tools, ornaments and even mirrors.

Exotic_Red.description: Exotic matter, an impossibility in your hands. Use an Orbital Exchange Interface to send to orbit.
Exotic_Red.flavorText: Like the other one, but Red.

Red_Exotic_Seed.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Clay_Brick_Window.flavorText: Reinforced Wood and Black Steel, a match made in Heaven.

Clay_Brick_Door.flavorText: Reinforced Wood and Black Steel, a match made in Heaven.

Clay_Brick_Railing.flavorText: Reinforced Wood and Black Steel, a match made in Heaven.

Mission_Communication_Device_T2.description: Interact to Receive a Mission From \'SMPL3\' - Simplified Mission Prospector Liaison V3
Mission_Communication_Device_T2.flavorText: Replacing UDA agents one mission at a time.

Stone_Throwing_Knife.description: A basic, balanced blade for taking down foes at medium distances.
Stone_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Icarus\'s unusually active tectonics provide a ready source of sedimentary rocks, making for easily knapped, sharp, but weak blades.

Steel_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Finely balanced knives like this can be thrown accurately with a little practice.

Sandworm_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Evolved to resist prolonged sand abrasion, the sandworm\'s chitin-analogue scales holds an excellent edge.

Steel_Throwing_Spear.description: A light, strong traditional spear design that holds its edge.
Steel_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: The word \'spear\' has descended to us through the ages largely unchanged.

Sandworm_Throwing_Spear.description: A spear crafted from an ancient organism\'s armor.
Sandworm_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: Group 15 continues to research sandworms, suspecting its subterranean evolution could hold clues to the bioeffects of exotics.

Shepherds_Pie.description: An all rounder, this will keep you going.

Stamina_Enhancement_Tonic.description: Providing a large amount of stamina and boosting maximum stamina and stamina regen for a short time.
Stamina_Enhancement_Tonic.flavorText: Like the energy drinks of old, sometimes you need a little pick me up.

Sustenence_Enhancement_Tonic.description: Providing a large amount of food, water and oxygen, and reducing their consumption for a short time.
Sustenence_Enhancement_Tonic.flavorText: Perfect for the prospector on the go.

Strength_Enhancement_Tonic.description: Provides a large boost to melee damage, throwing speed and physical resistance, for a short time.
Strength_Enhancement_Tonic.flavorText: For when you want to get up close and personal.

Dropship_Grenade_Workshop.description: Once thrown if the landing area is determined to be valid, will call your dropship to your current location.
Dropship_Grenade_Workshop.flavorText: Another amazing innovation thanks to Sinotai

Saltwater_Fish_Fillet.description: A neatly trimmed fillet ready for cooking.

Salt.description: A small pile of Salt, can be used on a salting station to preserve food.
Salt.flavorText: An essential mineral for adding flavour and preserving food.

Salting_Station.description: Can be used to preserve food, using salt.

Fish_01.description: A common freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_01.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_02.description: A common freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_02.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_04_Var4.description: A common saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_04_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_05.description: An uncommon saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_05.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_05_Var3.description: An uncommon saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_05_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_06_Var3.description: An uncommon saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_06_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_07_Var2.description: An uncommon freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_07_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_07_Var3.description: An uncommon freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_07_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_08_Var2.description: An uncommon freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_08_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_08_Var3.description: An uncommon freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_08_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_09.description: An uncommon freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_09.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_12_Var3.description: An uncommon saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_12_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_17_Var2.description: Unique to the Prometheus region, these fish can only be found in the Sulfur Pools of Volcanic areas.
Fish_17_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_17_Var4.description: Unique to the Prometheus region, these fish can only be found in the Sulfur Pools of Volcanic areas.
Fish_17_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_19_Var2.description: A common, freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_19_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_19_Var3.description: A common, freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_19_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Scorpion_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted out of a deadly Scorpion tail.
Scorpion_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Strawberry.description: A sweet and juicy fruit with a bright red color.
Strawberry.flavorText: The average berry contains around 200 tiny seeds

Cooked_Rhubarb.description: This snack is lightly cooked in a pan with sugar or honey

Stuffed_Avocado.description: This avocado has been halved and filled with a savory mixture.
Stuffed_Avocado.flavorText: Another great meal from your Cooking Station.

Strawberry_Jam.flavorText: A handy snack made at your Kitchen Bench.

Shepherds_Roll.description: A savory pastry baked until golden.
Shepherds_Roll.flavorText: A delicious meal made on your Biofuel Stove.

Savory_Roll.description: A hearty pastry baked to perfection.
Savory_Roll.flavorText: A delicious meal made on your Biofuel Stove.

Komodo_Statue_Stone.description: A fearsome foe made of stone.
Komodo_Statue_Stone.flavorText: They are cute when they aren\'t charging you.

Caveworm_Statue_Stone.description: A stone carving of a caveworm, minus the poison spit.

Deer_Statue_Stone.description: A graceful deer etched in stone.

Rabbit_Statue_Stone.description: Some rough stone carved into the shape of one of Icarus\' smallest creatures.
Rabbit_Statue_Stone.flavorText: The closest thing to a pet, for now.

Buffalo_Statue_Stone.description: A stone monument praising the mighty Buffalo.
Buffalo_Statue_Stone.flavorText: You need to be BUFF to carry this.

Spawn_Blocker_T2.description: A handy item that creates a zone of protection, reducing the likelihood of creatures within its small radius. Requires Spoiled Meat to Function.
Spawn_Blocker_T2.flavorText: Note to self: Does not stop bears chasing you...

Saltwater_Fillet_Sashimi.description: A delicacy consisting of raw, thinly sliced saltwater fish.
Saltwater_Fillet_Sashimi.flavorText: Can be made at a Cooking Station. Simple, but delicious.

Meta_Strawberry_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Strawberry Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Avocado_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Rhubarb_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Kumara_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Strawberry_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Shield_Steel.description: A sturdy shield made of durable steel, providing reliable protection against threats.
Shield_Steel.flavorText: With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.

Painting_Scroll.description: A portrait painting on canvas held in a scroll.
Painting_Scroll.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Scoria_Frame.description: A sturdy frame to build with.
Scoria_Frame.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Wall.description: A well-constructed base for your base.
Scoria_Wall.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Floor.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Ramp.description: A solid option for any construction.
Scoria_Ramp.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Wall_Angle.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Beam.description: A beam that provides rustic style and function.
Scoria_Beam.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Roof_Corner.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Half_Pitch.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Halfpiece.description: A basic half-piece for your walls.
Scoria_Halfpiece.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Scoria_Brick.description: A basic building block for all Scoria Brick building pieces.
Scoria_Brick.flavorText: A pyroclastic, highly vesicular, dark-colored type of volcanic rock that has been ejected from the ground in a molten form and then cooled.

Scoria_Brick_Floor.flavorText: The Scoria bricks used in this construction are far more lightweight than traditional building materials due to the trapped air pockets inside.

Scoria_Brick_Wall.description: A well-constructed base for your base.
Scoria_Brick_Wall.flavorText: The Scoria bricks used in this construction are far more lightweight than traditional building materials due to the trapped air pockets inside.

Scoria_Brick_Wall_Angle.flavorText: The Scoria bricks used in this construction are far more lightweight than traditional building materials due to the trapped air pockets inside.

Scoria_Brick_Ramp.description: A solid option for any construction.
Scoria_Brick_Ramp.flavorText: The Scoria bricks used in this construction are far more lightweight than traditional building materials due to the trapped air pockets inside.

Scoria_Brick_Beam.description: A beam that provides both style and function.
Scoria_Brick_Beam.flavorText: The Scoria bricks used in this construction are far more lightweight than traditional building materials due to the trapped air pockets inside.

Scoria_Brick_Roof_Corner.flavorText: The Scoria bricks used in this construction are far more lightweight than traditional building materials due to the trapped air pockets inside.

Scoria_Brick_Roof_Half_Pitch.flavorText: The Scoria bricks used in this construction are far more lightweight than traditional building materials due to the trapped air pockets inside.

Scoria_Brick_Halfpiece.description: A fancy half-piece for your walls.
Scoria_Brick_Halfpiece.flavorText: The Scoria bricks used in this construction are far more lightweight than traditional building materials due to the trapped air pockets inside.

Meta_Axe_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Axe. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Axe_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Pickaxe. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Knife. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Knife_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Spear. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Spear_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Delta.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Bow. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Bow_Shengong_Delta.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Bow. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Bow_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Module_Temperature.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit in regulating minor temperature fluctuations.
Meta_Module_Temperature.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Module_Extremes.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit in regulating your temperature in extreme environments.
Meta_Module_Extremes.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Claybrick_Trapdoor.flavorText: Reinforced Wood and Black Steel, a match made in Heaven.

Seed_Bread.flavorText: Better for you than white bread... doesn\'t taste quite as good.

Seed_Cracker.flavorText: This cracker resembles hardtack. Upholding the explorers tradition of terrible snack choices.

Animal_Feed.flavorText: Seed feed to satiate your creatures needs.

Stone_Stack_250.description: Chunks of sedimentary rock, easily worked.
Stone_Stack_250.flavorText: The geomorphology of Icarus has some similarities to Earth, but in many regards remains a mystery.

Silica_Ore_Stack_100.description: A key ingredient in concrete, glass and many other materials.
Silica_Ore_Stack_100.flavorText: The Silicon Age on Icarus is yet to arrive.

Sulfur_Ore_Stack_100.description: A common, flammable ingredient for torches and gunpowder.
Sulfur_Ore_Stack_100.flavorText: The tenth most common element in the universe, sulfur is essential for life, but also death, through its many different modes of incineration.

Shroud_Light.description: A handy shrouded light that gives off a cozy glow.

Stonejaw_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Stonejaw.
Stonejaw_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Snow_Rabbit_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Snow Rabbit.
Snow_Rabbit_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Scorpion_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Scorpion.
Scorpion_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Snow_Stalker_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Snow Stalker.
Snow_Stalker_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Stryder_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Stryder.
Stryder_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Wooly_Zebra_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Shaggy Zebra.
Wooly_Zebra_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Stonejaw_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Arctic_Rabbit_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Snow_Stalker_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Scorpion_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Stryder_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Wooly_Zebra_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Smoker_T3.description: A helpful device that can preserve food, using the power of smoke.
Smoker_T3.flavorText: The UDA advises you to use this item in a well-ventilated area.

Sandworm_Tendon.description: A tendon taken after battle with a fearsome creature.

Seed_Pouch.description: A convenient 12 slot pouch for your seeds.
Seed_Pouch.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Scorpion_FishingRod.description: An impressive fishing rod crafted from the spoils of defeating a Giant Scorpion.
Scorpion_FishingRod.flavorText: A weapon that was truly hard-won.

Scorpion_Crossbow.description: An impressive crossbow crafted from the spoils of defeating a Giant Scorpion.
Scorpion_Crossbow.flavorText: A weapon that was truly hard-won.

Sandworm_Attachment_Armor.description: An attachment that improves physical resistance but lowers fire resistance.
Sandworm_Attachment_Armor.flavorText: Can be equipped to chest armor at an Alteration Bench.

Beehive_Expansion.description: An expansion for your beehive that will increase its inventory space.
Beehive_Expansion.flavorText: The Bees of Icarus are known for their long, needle-like stingers which are capable of piercing even the toughest of envirosuits. Proceed with caution.

Animal_Feed_Speed.flavorText: Seed feed to satiate your creatures needs.

Animal_Feed_CarryWeight.flavorText: Seed feed to satiate your creatures needs.

Sugar_Cane.description: A piece of raw sugar cane, ready for processing.

Sugar.description: A handful of sweet sugar cubes.

SugarCane_Seed_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Meta_SugarCane_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Sugar Cane Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Sugar_Cane_Seed.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Sandworm_Trophy_Brazier.description: A Sandworm head that has been skillfully turned into a brazier.
Sandworm_Trophy_Brazier.flavorText: Really adds that finishing touch to your cozy outdoor area.

Saddle_Sandworm.description: A fashionable saddle for your mount made from luxurious Sandworm skin.

Saddle_Cart_Plough.description: A cart which when stocked with seeds, dirt, and pulled by an animal, will create mounds with planted seeds.
Saddle_Cart_Plough.flavorText: Can be pulled by a tamed Buffalo or Tusker.

Water_Trough_Stone.description: Allows multiple creatures to drink from at once and can be connected to a water network.
Water_Trough_Stone.flavorText: Every good animal farm has one of these.

Coconut_Seed.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Coconut_Seed_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Bramble_Seed.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Bramble_Seed_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Sheep_Head.description: A preserved memory of a wooly friend.
Sheep_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Animal_Bed_SnowLeopardSkin.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_SnowLeopardSkin.flavorText: Wow. You killed a rare animal to make a bed for your pet.

Animal_Bed_Striker.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Striker.flavorText: Hopefully this bed doesn\'t give your pet nightmares.

Snare_Trap.description: A unique device that allows you to bait and capture select wild animals that can slowly be tamed. Craft Baits at the Ranching Station.

Scrambled_Eggs.description: A portion of gently cooked whisked eggs spread on lightly toasted bread.
Scrambled_Eggs.flavorText: Now if only there was bacon...

Smashed_Avocado.description: A generous helping of smashed avocado spread on lightly toasted bread.
Smashed_Avocado.flavorText: Super popular on earth in the 2010s

Food_Animal_Feed_Carrot.description: A feed that promotes short and fast travel.

Food_Animal_Feed_Bean.description: A feed that promotes defence and survival.

Minihippo_Egg.description: A strange egg with movement inside, it must be close to hatching.

Sand.description: Clear Icarus Sand extracted from the ground with a shovel.
Sand.flavorText: I hear sand can be used to make glass.

Single_Wall_Light.flavorText: A simple light for your lighting needs.

Stone_Cairn.description: A pile of stones, which can mark a significant location for a prospector.
Stone_Cairn.flavorText: What significance does this place hold?

Dressing_Kit.description: Heals basic wounds, deep wounds, frostbite and heatstroke.

Clay_Brick_Railing_Gate.description: A sturdy elegant looking Railing Gate.
Clay_Brick_Railing_Gate.flavorText: Reinforced Wood and Black Steel, a match made in Heaven.

Stone_Brick_Floor.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Wall.description: A well-constructed base for your base.
Stone_Brick_Wall.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Wall_Angle.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Ramp.description: A solid option for any construction.
Stone_Brick_Ramp.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Beam.description: A beam that provides both style and function.
Stone_Brick_Beam.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Roof_Corner.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Roof_Half_Pitch.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Stone_Brick_Halfpiece.description: A homely half-piece for your walls.
Stone_Brick_Halfpiece.flavorText: Shaped stone, the building blocks of civilized construction.

Kiwi_Fruit_Seed.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Kiwi_Fruit_Seed_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Stone_Brick.description: A solid and reliable stone brick, for building strong structures.

Sandworm_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
Sandworm_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Sandworm_Trophy_Head.flavorText: Which room will you put this in?

Sandworm_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Sandworm Creature.

Scorpion_Boss_Trophy_Throne.description: A preserved Scorpion that\'s been skillfully molded into a chair.
Scorpion_Boss_Trophy_Throne.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Scorpion_Boss_Trophy_Tail.description: A preserved Scorpion tail from a fine specimen.
Scorpion_Boss_Trophy_Tail.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Pistol_T3.description: A weapon with decent bang for your buck.

Sandworm_Floor.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Wall.description: A well-constructed base for your base.
Sandworm_Wall.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Wall_Angle.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Ramp.description: A solid option for any construction.
Sandworm_Ramp.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Beam.description: A beam that provides rustic style and function.
Sandworm_Beam.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Roof_Corner.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Half_Pitch.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Sandworm_Halfpiece.description: A basic half-piece for your walls.
Sandworm_Halfpiece.flavorText: Not the most conventional building material but anything goes on Icarus.

Stasis_Bag.description: A bag inlaid with technology that puts the user into a chemical stasis for later treatment.
Stasis_Bag.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Stasis_Bag_Full_NPC4.description: Simmons is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Stasis_Bag_Full_NPC4.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Stasis_Bag_Full_NPC5.description: Washington is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Stasis_Bag_Full_NPC5.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Strawberry_Candy.description: A small candy perfect for quick bursts of energy.
Strawberry_Candy.flavorText: What could go wrong with a small sugary treat?

Plough_Steel.description: An attachment for the seeding cart to create quality mounds when seeding.

Plough_Platinum.description: An attachment for the seeding cart to create medium quality mounds when seeding.

Plough_Titanium.description: An attachment for the seeding cart to create high quality mounds when seeding.

Stationeers_Bobblehead.description: A cute trophy showing off your love for Stationeers.
Stationeers_Bobblehead.flavorText: Not sure how you got the UDA to agree to delivering this...

Rifle_Assault.description: An automatic firearm that fires low caliber pistol rounds. Works with Pistol Attachments and Talents.

LegendaryWeapon_SlugLauncher.description: A Prototype Upgradeable Launcher created via studying of the Hammerhead Slug.
LegendaryWeapon_SlugLauncher.flavorText: Another Weird Norex Invention, this one shoots Slime?

Scoria_Stack_100.description: A rough-textured rock ejected from the earth during volcanic activity.
Scoria_Stack_100.flavorText: Also known in some areas as \'lava stone\'.

Strawberries_And_Cream.description: Fresh Cream and Strawberries existing in perfect harmony.

Submachine_Gun.description: An automatic firearm that fires low caliber pistol rounds. Works with Pistol Attachments and Talents.

Synthetic_Enzymes.description: Synthetic Enzymes used in the Terraforming Process in Icarus.
Synthetic_Enzymes.flavorText: The Catalyst used in the Terraforming Process

Synthetic_Enzyme_Stack.description: Synthetic Enzymes used in the Terraforming Process in Icarus.
Synthetic_Enzyme_Stack.flavorText: The Catalyst used in the Terraforming Process

Seed_Extractor.description: A simple tool which grinds up fruit and vegetables and extracts their seeds.

Stasis_Bag_Full_IM_Researcher2.description: Felix is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Stasis_Bag_Full_IM_Researcher2.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Seed_Harvester.description: An attachment for the Harvesting Cart enabling collection of seeds while harvesting

Brick_Sign_Small.description: A clay brick sign to display information.

Composite_Sign_Small.description: A composite sign to display information.

Iron_Sign_Small.description: An iron sign to display information.

Stone_Sign_Small.description: A stone sign to display information.

Prop_Corkboard_Small.description: Contains notes and detailed diagrams of various things.

Prop_Saddle_Bag.description: A small saddle bag that can store small objects.

Banana_Seed.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Banana_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Prop_Sled.description: An old Sled, it could almost be functional if it wasn\'t so worn out.
Prop_Sled.flavorText: A few of these and you could get a race going.

Prop_Surgical_Equipment.description: A set of sterilized surgical equipment used for operations or experimentation.

Mission_Shackles.description: Rusted and Worn Shackles, these have been used before.

Prop_Stirrer.description: A device used to thoroughly mix compounds via stirring.

Prop_Mortar_And_Pestle.description: A mortar and pestle used for grinding up elements.

Prop_Scales.description: A deviced that can be used to measure weight.

Prop_Surgical_Masks.description: A box of surgical masks that can be used to filter contaminates in and out of your mouth.

Prop_Skeleton.description: A fully anatomically correct skeleton stand.

Prop_Soap.description: A device which releases soap from the base when pushed.
Prop_Soap.flavorText: A good prospector always washes their hands.

Prop_Science_Tray.description: A tray containing different bits of equipment used in science experiments.

Mission_DNA_Scalpel.description: A very sharp implement for cutting through flesh.

Mission_DNA_Sample.description: A Stable Sample of Garganutan DNA ready for Transport.
Mission_DNA_Sample.flavorText: You could have worked in a lab.

Pouch_Generic.description: A convenient 6 slot pouch for general use.
Pouch_Generic.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Pouch_Generic_Red.description: A convenient 6 slot pouch for general use.
Pouch_Generic_Red.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Pouch_Generic_Green.description: A convenient 6 slot pouch for general use.
Pouch_Generic_Green.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Pouch_Generic_Blue.description: A convenient 6 slot pouch for general use.
Pouch_Generic_Blue.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC1.description: Voss is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC1.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC2.description: Harken is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC2.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC3.description: Biggs is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC3.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC4.description: Wedge is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC4.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Truffle_Seed.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

StoneBrick_Fireplace.description: A classically built fireplace. Built for longevity, can be used to cook and heat.
StoneBrick_Fireplace.flavorText: Still used on earth to this day.

StoneBrick_Fireplace_Ext.description: An Extension for the Stone Brick Fireplace.

StoneBrick_Fireplace_Cap.description: Vents the smoke so it doesn\'t fill your room.

Spider_Head.description: A preserved memory of a many legged creature.
Spider_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Spider_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Spider_Silk.description: Strong silk produced by spiders created from their webbing.

Animal_Gruel_Rotten.description: The bare minimum in terms of nutrition.

Animal_Silage.description: Long-life, fermented animal feed. Simple but Convenient.
